heading: Thomas R. Pickering Foreign Affairs Fellowship Program
label: 2665c Thomas R. Pickering Foreign Affairs Fellowship Program
notes: DefinitionsFor definition of “Department” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 119–60section 2651 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: There shall be in the Department a Thomas R. Pickering Foreign Affairs Fellowship Program.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: b Purpose
children.text: The program required by subsection (a) shall continue to provide financial assistance, mentoring, and professional development opportunities to graduate students who commit to pursuing careers in the Foreign Service of the United States.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: c Administration
children.text: The program required by subsection (a) shall be administered by the Department, consistent with existing law and regulations.
